top_signals.title: JetBlue to reduce Newark, LaGuardia footprint as it forges ahead in Fort Lauderdale
top_signals.summary: JetBlue is planning to cut crew bases at Newark Liberty International Airport in New Jersey and New York's LaGuardia Airport.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Switzerland loses its shine as central bank gold vault
top_signals.summary: After banks were net sellers in March, they added a net 17 tonnes of gold in April, led mainly by Poland and China.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Rio Tinto’s copper mine blocked: protesters halt Oyu Tolgoi exports
top_signals.summary: Demonstrators halted concentrate shipments as calls grow for a larger share of mining wealth in the resource-rich nation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: KOL: How Santiago Lastra reimagined Mexican food with British ingredients
top_signals.summary: London’s Mexican food scene is going from strength to strength, and it doesn’t get any better than Michelin-starred KOL, writes Carys Sharkey Sacks filled to the brim with scarlet mounds of chillies sit in Ocean Spray cranberry juice boxes in the oppressive midday sun of Oaxaca City.
